Hey, what's up guys? You'll make this whole process a lot faster if you do video speed controller. It's this puppy right here. You go to the Google Chrome store and then you just buy this thing. Now, why I'm telling you this is because... let me show you. If you're watching a video, see how there's this little 1-0-0 that comes at the top? If I just do shift-D, I can speed this puppy up. Okay guys, so I'm going to show you something that you've been licensed for this... ...do you want to talk about it? Okay, so there's something else that you can listen to... In that way, you can listen to it at the rate that you can understand it, rather than at the rate that my mouth moves, which unfortunately is confined by my human body, rather than by our intelligence and our ability to process information. So this way, you'll be able to at least go through everything, you know, 50% faster at least, and just slow down stuff when you want to hear it more than once. But a lot of times, just the gaps in the breath, so we have to take one more communicating. You can fast forward through that stuff if you increase the speed. So this is just a little hack to help make this more manageable for you.
